params.name: Protestantism and Capitalism Spirit
params.description: Protestant Ethics and Capitalist Spirit is an important work written by German sociologist Weber. In this work, Weber explores how Protestant ethics have promoted the development of capitalism, especially the teachings of Calvinism, and how they have shaped a spiritual temperament conducive to the rise of capitalism. At the same time, Weber also warned that with the development of capitalism, this spirit may be replaced by material interests and efficiency pursuits, leading people to be bound by …
